M-017.NAME: route-sync-runtime
M-017.owns: Full Tunnel routing cleanup, tunnel-health status integration, and deploy-script checks that ensure removed split-tunneling/ipset artifacts do not return

exports.fn-routing_manager-get_status: Returns Full Tunnel health status through RoutingManager
exports.fn-get_routing_status: Exposes tunnel status for frontend/admin visibility
exports.check-deploy-full-tunnel: Verifies deploy scripts no longer create ipset, mangle, or resolver artifacts

M-017.hotspot: H-005: Full Tunnel cleanup is simpler than route sync but stale host-routing artifacts can break verification
H-016: Removed RU IP auto-update references must stay absent from deploy and verification surfaces
